recommendations.title: Start one agent pilot this week
recommendations.detail: Pick a repetitive workflow and prototype an AI agent to automate it — this is the highest-impact move for your profile right now.
recommendations.changeReason: Agent adoption accelerated — early movers gain disproportionate advantage.

recommendations.title: Build and publish one agent project
recommendations.detail: Create a public agent demo and add it to your portfolio — hiring managers are actively scanning for this.
recommendations.changeReason: Agent-building became a baseline hiring expectation this week.

recommendations.title: Map the agent infrastructure stack
recommendations.detail: Identify the models, orchestration, and tooling layers — find one underpriced investment or partnership opportunity.
recommendations.changeReason: Agent infrastructure is attracting concentrated capital.

recommendations.title: Audit AI security in your environment
recommendations.detail: Review whether your tools detect AI-generated phishing and whether AI tools in use meet security standards.
recommendations.changeReason: AI-powered threat success rates climbed this week.

recommendations.title: Review approved AI diagnostic tools
recommendations.detail: Check which AI diagnostics are approved in your region and whether your organization has an evaluation workflow.
recommendations.changeReason: Two new regulatory approvals this week.

recommendations.title: Write a one-page AI-native business thesis
recommendations.detail: Validate with ten potential customers before building — AI-native founding velocity makes speed critical.
recommendations.changeReason: AI-native founding velocity hit a new high.

recommendations.title: Run a cloud cost review
recommendations.detail: Identify one optimization opportunity in your team's infrastructure spend this month.
recommendations.changeReason: Cloud cost pressure remains constant as AI workloads scale.

recommendations.title: Track one storage deployment in your region
recommendations.detail: Follow a utility-scale storage project announcement and note the companies and roles involved.
recommendations.changeReason: Utility-scale storage contracts signed at record pace.

recommendations.title: Follow three humanoid pilot announcements
recommendations.detail: Note which industries deploy first — this signals where robotics careers and investments concentrate.
recommendations.changeReason: Humanoid pilot deployments doubled this week.

recommendations.title: Review VC allocation in your portfolio
recommendations.detail: Check AI concentration across holdings and rebalance to avoid over-exposure to a single sub-category.
recommendations.changeReason: AI share of total VC funding reached a new high.
